content: Typewriter effect in React: Use useState + useEffect with setInterval to reveal characters one at a time. Store displayedText in state, increment character index on timer (40ms per char). Skip button sets displayedText to full sentence immediately. Use useRef for timer cleanup. Framer Motion not needed for the character-by-character effect itself -- use it for the container fade-in/out transitions between sentences. Key pattern: sentence-- in AnimatePresence.
